title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Chennai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies:
HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies!
